skill_phase_notes.answer_questions_in_context: User asked 'what happened exactly' after completing the beginner task. Explained Glob and Read tools, why Claude started where it did, and connected the navigation pattern to the user's Python background.
skill_phase_notes.debrief: Named the concept (tool use as navigation), connected it to the bigger picture of Claude Code as an agent, gave a concrete next-step example using their finance dashboard, and previewed Lesson 2.

tone_checks.analogy_used: Developers knowing which file to open first when debugging — compared to Claude using Glob/Read

concept_named: Tool use as navigation — Claude explores codebases the same way a developer does, using Glob to map structure and Read to examine relevant files, guided by the specificity of the prompt.
connects_to_next_lesson: Lesson 2: Tool Use — how tools combine for multi-step tasks
